  4_requires_1 -.-> 3_requires_0

  6_provides_0 -.-> 4_provides_0

  8_provides_0 -.-> 2_provides_0

 * - UserRepository provided in simple.ts at ln 25 col 28 by `UserRepository.Default`

 * - DbConnection provided in simple.ts at ln 6 col 9 by `DbConnection.Default`
